title: Just Join Already
description: For those veterans in the group chat who has to explain what Modrinth is every time someone wants to play Minecraft “like the trailers.”
body:
# Just Join Already **Just Join Already** is a lightweight, shader-ready, SMP-safe modpack designed to make Minecraft look better without overwhelming new players — and without giving veterans a headache trying to get their friends to “just launch the game.” Whether it’s your rich buddy with a 4090 who wants to see Minecraft “like in the trailers,” or a friend who hasn’t touched a block in 10 years, this pack will get them playing in one click — no yelling required. --- ## 🎯 Purpose This modpack isn’t built *for* the veteran — it’s built **by** them. Let’s be honest: veterans already have their own 400-mod builds and tweaked configs. What they *don’t* have is the **patience** to troubleshoot someone’s JVM arguments over Discord at 1am. > This pack exists so the veteran can finally say: > _“Download this. Don’t touch anything. Just join already.”_ --- ## ✅ Features - 🧠 **Zero-setup, newbie-proof** install - 🌄 **Shaders included and configured**: Complementary, BSL, and MakeUp UltraFast - 💨 **Performance mods**: Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix, etc. - 👁️ **Visual polish**: Dynamic lights, Better Lanterns, 3D tools & rails, Enhanced Block Entities - 🔧 **Quality of Life**: Zoomify, Jade, Appleskin, Equipment Compare, Controlling - 🎮 **Controller support** with Controlify – yes, it just works - 🗺️ **Xaero’s minimap + worldmap** for smoother exploration - 🎨 **Clean and modern look** with Fresh Animations, Faithful, and optional resourcepacks - 🧱 **SMP-safe** – no magic, tech, or progression overhauls --- ## 🚫 What It's Not - No RPG mechanics - No quests - No “what mod adds this sword???” moments - No worldgen that breaks vanilla - No mods that will confuse someone playing for the first time --- ## 🧭 Ideal For: - **Veteran players** who just want their friends to join without config drama - **New players** who want Minecraft to look good out of the box - **SMPs or LAN parties** where 90% of the group won’t read instructions --- ## 📦 Final Words You don’t need to know what a `.jar` is. You don’t need to fiddle with settings. You just need to click play. **Just Join Already.** ---
📦 Mods, Resource Packs, & Shader Packs Used (click to expand) ### Mods 1. **Xaero's Minimap** 2. **Controlify** 3. **Equipment Compare** 4. **Searchables** 5. **Entity Culling** 6. **ModernFix** 7. **Jade** 8. **Sodium** 9. **LambDynamicLights** 10. **Enhanced Block Entities** 11. **MoreCulling** 12. **ImmediatelyFast** 13. **CIT Resewn** 14. **Continuity** 15. **Xaero's World Map** 16. **Fabric API** 17. **TooltipFix** 18. **Controlling** 19. **Advancement Plaques** 20. **Sodium Extra** 21. **Reese's Sodium Options** 22. **Cloth Config** 23. **Fabric Language Kotlin** 24. **Iris Shaders** 25. **Zoomify** 26. **AppleSkin** 27. **Entity Model Features** 28. **Forge Config API Port** 29. **FerriteCore** 30. **Yet Another Config Lib** 31. **More Chat History** 32. **Mod Menu** 33. **Placeholder API** 34. **Puzzles Lib** 35. **Visuality** 36. **Leave My Bars Alone** 37. **Iceberg** 38. **Entity Texture Features** 39. **Lithium** ### Resource Packs 1. **Faithful 32x** 2. **LowOnFire** 3. **Fresh Animations** 4. **Crops 3D** 5. **Even Better Enchants** 6. **Bare Bones** 7. **Faithful 64x** 8. **RAY's 3D Rails** 9. **Better Lanterns** 10. **Remodeled Doors** 11. **RAY's 3D Ladders** 12. **Recolourful Containers** 13. **Rays 3D Mace** ### Shader Packs 1. **BSL Shaders** 2. **Complementary Reimagined** 3. **MakeUp UltraFast**
